chapter_title.en: Crying out of Fear of Allah

parts.text: أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

text: : كل عين باكية يوم القيامة الا ثلاثة أعين: عين غضت عن محارف الله أو عين سهرت في طاعة الله أو عين بكت في جوف الليل من خشية الله.

en.shaykh-tahir-ridha-jaffer: 3.Muḥammad ibn Abī ʿUmayr narrated from Manṣūr ibn Yūnus, from Ṣāliḥ ibn Razīn and others, from Abū ʿAbdillāh (a) who said, “Every eye will be weeping on the Day of Judgment except three eyes: the eye that lowered its gaze from what Allah had forbidden, or the eye that stayed awake in the worship of Allah, or the eye that wept in the middle of the night out of the fear of Allah.”
